name: Garden Terrace Inn
description: A charming country inn in southern New Hampshire with wildflower gardens, a rustic barn, and mountain views.
catering_notes: We have a small in-house menu available but happily welcome outside caterers at no extra fee. Our barn kitchen has basic prep facilities for outside vendors.

cancellation_policy.12_plus_months: Full deposit refunded minus $100 processing fee

deposit_and_cancellation.note: We're flexible on cancellations — we'd rather work with you to reschedule than lose you.

ratings.new_vendor_note: Newer wedding venue — offering 15% off for couples who leave a review

personality: warm and folksy, budget-friendly, eager to fill dates, very willing to negotiate
